creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
One of the remarkable lunches we’ve had last year! 

So although it’s a little late to post and they’ve already launched a new business lunch set, I have to share this!

📍 BB Social Dining, DIFC
🍽️ Creative Asian-style menu. Must-try are the soft-shell crab bao, veal ribs, and bao nut.
💰 Weekday Business Lunch: 125 AED (3 course menu).

• Please note that the lunch set we had was from last season, but you can still try those dishes when you order from the a la carte menu

Save this for your next lunch date!
